title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 77.330 - May appoint what officers
text:
77.330.  May appoint what officers. — The mayor, with the consent and approval of a majority of the members elected to the city council, shall have power to appoint a street commissioner and such other officers as he may be authorized by ordinance to appoint.
(RSMo 1939 § 6879) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 6733; 1919 § 8220; 1909 § 9157
